description_long: This object is a classic AK-47 style assault rifle, featuring a long, matte black metal barrel and receiver with a prominent wooden stock and handguard. The stock and handguard are finished in a warm, reddish-brown wood grain, contrasting with the dark metallic components. The rifle has a curved, detachable box magazine, typical of this firearm type, and a pistol grip made of black polymer or metal. Iron sights are mounted on the top, with the front sight post and rear notch clearly visible. The muzzle end is fitted with a simple flash hider, and the overall design is robust and utilitarian, reflecting its military origins. The rifle's proportions and details suggest it is designed for both durability and ease of use in urban environments.
description: A classic AK-47 style rifle with a black metal body, wooden stock and handguard, and a curved magazine. The design is robust, with iron sights and a flash hider at the muzzle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel, front sight post, and the alignment of the wooden handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, handguard, and the magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
